fields.label: Head Scripts
fields.name: head_scripts
fields.instructions: Add custom scripts before the closing </head> tag.

fields.label: Body Scripts - Top
fields.name: body_scripts_top
fields.instructions: Add custom scripts after the opening <body> tag.

fields.label: Body Scripts - Bottom
fields.name: body_scripts_bottom
fields.instructions: Add custom scripts before the closeing </body> tag.

sub_fields.label: Default Post Image
sub_fields.name: default_thumbnail
sub_fields.instructions: This will be used for posts that don't have a featured image
